results.title: Switch default local models to EmbeddingGemma and Gemma 4
results.content: Updated config defaults, compose envs, download script, docs, and runtime metadata from Qwen GGUFs to ggml-org/embeddinggemma-300M-GGUF and ggml-org/gemma-4-E2B-it-GGUF. Also changed default embedding dimension from 1024 to 768 and aligned Milvus collection defaults plus config tests.

results.title: Qwen references cleaned after local-model rename
results.content: Replaced stale minder.embedding.qwen import in scripts/seed_skills.py with minder.embedding.local.LocalEmbeddingProvider and updated remaining docs to use local/Gemma/EmbeddingGemma terminology plus local.py paths. Files: scripts/seed_skills.py, README.md, docs/system-design.md, docs/plan/06-operations-and-delivery.md, docs/TASK_BREAKDOWN.md, docs/PROJECT_PROGRESS.md, docs/guides/production-deployment.md.

results.title: Compose runtime activation uses auto runtimes with safe fallback
results.content: Enabled langgraph, litellm, and llama-cpp-python in the Minder dev stack. Compose now sets explicit orchestration and model-path env vars, MinderGraph instantiates Qwen/OpenAI runtimes with runtime=auto, and server startup prints a runtime summary. Hardened QwenLocalLLM, QwenEmbeddingProvider, and OpenAIFallbackLLM so provider initialization or network failures fall back cleanly instead of crashing boot, seed scripts, or tests.

results.title: Minder switched to Qwen plan split
results.content: Updated the Minder planning docs to use Qwen/Qwen3-Embedding-0.6B quantized GGUF for embeddings and Qwen3.5-0.8B quantized GGUF for the local LLM, both intended to run through llama.cpp via llama-cpp-python. Split docs/PLAN.md into an index plus docs/plan/01-06 focused documents covering scope, architecture, data/tools, workflow governance, implementation phases, and operations/delivery.

results.title: Public channel response includes deepLinkUrl
results.content: Extended public channel projection to return deepLinkUrl for supported channel types in public/admin configuration responses. Implemented mapping in PublicChannelProjectionService: ZALO -> https://zalo.me/<oaId>, LINE -> https://line.me/R/ti/p/@<basicId>, WHATSAPP -> https://wa.me/<digits>, FACEBOOK -> https://m.me/<pageUsername or fallback id>. Added deepLinkUrl to PublicChannelResponseDto. Verified with yarn build and eslint.
